prestazioni: Engine swap to a Mercedes-Benz M117.968 5.6L V8 with forged internals (Mahle pistons, Carrillo H-beam rods, and a billet crankshaft) paired with a custom Schrick 284° camshaft profile for high-lift, long-duration performance, retaining the original Bosch KE-Jetronic fuel injection but upgraded with a Kugelfischer mechanical fuel pump and larger injectors (Bosch 0 280 150 945) for precise fuel delivery at high RPMs.

Forced induction via a Garrett GT4202 turbocharger (82mm compressor wheel, .82 A/R turbine housing) with a custom air-to-water intercooler (Setrab ProLine 40-row core) and a Tial MV-R 50mm wastegate to manage boost levels up to 1.2 bar, mated to a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system with a MagnaFlow 10416 catalytic converter and a Borla Pro XS muffler for optimized flow and sound.

Suspension overhaul with a KW Variant 3 coilover kit (rebound-adjustable dampers, 8-position compression adjustment) paired with Eibach Pro-Kit springs (1.7-inch drop) and polyurethane bushings (Energy Suspension 9.5111G) for the front control arms and subframe, complemented by a Whiteline front sway bar (24mm) and a rear sway bar (22mm) to reduce body roll during aggressive cornering.
estetica: Widebody conversion using a RENNtech SEC AMG-style kit (hand-laid carbon fiber fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser) with custom 3-piece BBS RS-GT wheels (9x18 ET15 front, 10.5x18 ET25 rear) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/40/18 front, 285/35/18 rear) for a staggered fitment.

Custom interior retrim with Recaro SRD-E full bucket seats (carbon fiber shells, Schroth 6-point harnesses) and a MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (380mm diameter, suede grip) paired with a custom aluminum shift knob (short-throw adapter by B&M) and a full Alcantara headliner (EuroComp Ultrasuede).

Exterior lighting upgrade with Hella Rallye 4000 Supertones (7-inch Cibié lenses) for the front, custom LED taillights (Vland sequential turn signals with smoked lenses), and a custom carbon fiber hood (Renntech design with functional NACA ducts) to reduce weight and improve airflow to the intercooler.
